title: nasturtium sylvestre var. anceps
intro: Nasturtium sylvestre var. anceps, also known as watercress or tall nasturtium, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a member of the wild mustard family and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, providing numerous health benefits such as antioxidant activity, anti-cancer properties, and the ability to support digestive health. Nasturtium sylvestre var. anceps can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, salves, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
